honesty.note: Meshes are procedural PLACEHOLDER_GEOMETRY or DESIGN_PROPOSAL unless badge says otherwise. Layout dims ASSERTION_EXTRACTED from SRC-CAND-000010 only. No invented torque, materials, mounts, kWh, or kW.

prototype_status.label: EDTS VPR-2 Architecture and Interaction Prototype

architecture_note: Six domain TABLES (COMP/GEO/EVD/EGS/SIM/UI) in one persistence target — not six independent database services.

storage_tiers.note: Six domains map into three physical tiers — not six microservices.
